content.content:
Q2 FY24 Earnings Presentation
Quarter End: September 29, 2023
Earnings Announcement: October 25, 2023

This presentation contains forward-looking statements within the meaning of U.S. securities laws, including statements related to our future financial results and our guidance for future financial performance. These forward-looking statements are based on current expectations, forecasts and assumptions involving risks and uncertainties that could cause the actual outcomes and results to differ materially from those anticipated by these forward-looking statements.

Q2 financial performance – TOTAL FLEX
REVENUE: $7.5B
ADJ. OPERATING INCOME: $439M
ADJ. NET INCOME: $303M
ADJ. EARNINGS PER SHARE: $0.68
Q2 financial performance – CORE FLEX
REVENUE: $6.9B
ADJ. OPERATING INCOME: $327M
ADJ. NET INCOME: $249M
ADJ. EARNINGS PER SHARE: $0.56

MARKET TRENDS
Focus markets include Cloud/AI demand, Next Gen Mobility, Digital healthcare, and Renewables. Regionalization trends continue.
FLEX EXECUTION
Margins expanding with Q2 Core Flex adjusted Operating Margins expanded both sequentially and year-over-year. Expect continued expansion in Q3 and through F24.

Key financials for Q2F24:
TOTAL FLEX
Revenue: $7,471M
Adj. Gross Profit / Margin: $676M / 9.0%
Adj. Operating Income / Margin: $439M / 5.9%
Adj. Earnings Per Share: $0.68
CORE FLEX
Revenue: $6,932M
Adj. Gross Profit / Margin: $523M / 7.5%
Adj. Operating Income / Margin: $327M / 4.7%
Adj. Earnings Per Share: $0.56

Flex Reliability Solutions
Revenue: $3.3B, flat
Adj. Operating Income: $171M, (2%)
Adj. Operating Margin: 5.2%
Flex Agility Solutions
Revenue: $3.6B, (10%)
Adj. Operating Income: $168M, (1%)
Adj. Operating Margin: 4.6%
Nextracker
Revenue: $0.6B, 21%
Adj. Operating Income: $112M, 160%
Adj. Operating Margin: 19.5%

GAAP NET INCOME: $406M
Operating Cash Flow: $357M
Capital Expenditures, net: ($144M)
Adj. Free Cash Flow: $213M
Payments for Share Repurchases: ($309M)

Flex Agility Solutions
CEC: IT spending environment remains dynamic; AI-driven Cloud spending strong.
Lifestyle: Strong market position with premium brands, consumer-related demand remains soft.
Consumer Devices: Consumer end market weakness persisting.
Flex Reliability Solutions
Automotive: Secular trends, including electrification driving demand.
Health Solutions: Multiple program ramps continue supported by long-term secular trends.
Industrial: Continued demand in high growth areas such as EV charging, automation and cloud/critical power.

TOTAL FLEX
Revenue: $6.5B - $6.9B
Adj. Operating Income: $375M - $425M
Adj. Earnings Per Share: $0.57 - $0.65
CORE FLEX
Revenue: $5.9B - $6.3B
Adj. Operating Income: $280M - $310M
Adj. Earnings Per Share: $0.47 - $0.52

TOTAL FLEX
Revenue: $28.1B - $28.8B
Adj. Operating Margin: 5.8% - 6.0%
Adj. Earnings Per Share: $2.49 - $2.66
CORE FLEX
Revenue: $25.9B - $26.5B
Adj. Operating Margin: 4.8% - 4.9%
Adj. Earnings Per Share: $2.05 - $2.18

Delivering on long-term performance commitments. Strong execution on margin expansion, portfolio strategy. Executing on capital allocation strategy; focused on continued buybacks. Nextracker Tax-Free Spin expected in FQ4. Reiterate F2025 target: $2.65 Core Flex Adjusted Earnings Per Share.
